case_title: TOMAS PENA VS. ALICIA S. MCGEE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $802.37 FILED BY PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT MCGEE, ALICIA S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MCGEE, ALICIA S.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-28-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
